title: Microsoft: Copilot Excel Wiki Agent
desc: Built an AI knowledge agent on SharePoint giving Excel designers instant, cited answers on craft, process, accessibility, and handoffs. Cut onboarding by 40%, saved 3hrs/week per designer, and hit 87% query resolution with 90% team adoption in a 4-week pilot.
summary: AI knowledge assistant cutting designer onboarding by 40% and saving 3hrs/week per designer.

title: Excel Charting : AI-Powered Chart Design Recommendations
desc: Designed a Copilot feature that analyzes data shape, infers user intent, and recommends optimal chart configs with story-first titles like “Quarterly Trends.” Collaborated with ML engineers on RAG model tuning, eliminating chart type decision fatigue and making great visualizations accessible to all.
summary: LLM-powered chart suggestions auto-surfacing 4 story-first options on every chart insert.

title: Excel Charting : AI-Powered Chart Insights
desc: Designed an AI system that surfaces trends, anomalies, and comparisons the moment a chart is inserted in Excel. Increased chart retention by 15%, validated Copilot’s value for non-coders, and repositioned Excel as an analytical assistant—not just a calculation tool—with 65% positive sentiment.
summary: Copilot feature surfacing auto-generated chart insights, boosting chart retention by 15%.

title: Smarter Chart Defaults: The Modern Colors Revolution
desc: 40% of users immediately changed chart colors post-insert—a clear signal defaults were broken. Championed a modernized palette shipped in 8 weeks that achieved 96% acceptance, eliminated first-touch friction, and became the visual foundation for all AI-powered charting features in FY25.
summary: Modernized Excel’s default chart palette—96% acceptance, highest design ROI in FY25.

title: Excel Data Visualisation: The Strategy Behind the Roadmap
desc: Led 4 parallel research tracks—experience audit, 30+ app competitive study, user feedback synthesis, and telemetry analysis—to build a prioritized roadmap. Reframed chart drop-off from UX issue to adoption crisis, forming the strategic foundation for every charting feature shipped.
summary: Research-led strategy reframing Excel’s 98% chart drop-off as a product adoption crisis.

title: Airtel Thanks 2.0: Redesigning Airtel Thanks Program
desc: Led UX of Airtel Thanks 2.0—a complex rewards and tier program simplified into an intuitive super app. Navigated competing priorities across services and content, established a dedicated growth design function, and delivered a 6% MAU engagement lift across 100M+ active users post-launch.
summary: Redesigned India’s telecom loyalty super-app for 100M+ users. Zero critical incidents at launch.

title: ThinkPlanty.com: Idea, Product & Strategy
desc: Built an end-to-end D2C plant e-commerce brand from idea to execution—brand identity, UX, and automated fulfillment. Grew a traditionally offline category digitally, crossing 1000+ orders with 85% customer retention and 4% MoM growth through obsessive post-purchase experience design.
summary: Online plant gifting startup—1000+ orders, 85% retention, 4% MoM growth from zero.

title: Watchlyst App: Idea, Product & Strategy
desc: Solved the paradox of choice in entertainment by aggregating OTT, TV, and live venues into one personalized watchlist app. Reached 50K downloads organically, secured $40K from Facebook Accelerator, achieved 2.5-min average sessions—10x industry standard—and grew an 8K+ Instagram community.
summary: Entertainment discovery app—50K downloads, $40K from Facebook Accelerator, zero paid marketing.

title: GrowthX Capstone: Hotjar Case Study
desc: GrowthX capstone applying growth frameworks to Hotjar’s acquisition and retention funnel. Led a team of 7 to identify growth levers, structure experiments, and build a GTM hypothesis backed by user research, funnel analytics, and north star metric alignment over 8 intensive weeks.
summary: 8-week growth bootcamp capstone—team of 7 solving Hotjar’s real acquisition and retention gaps.

title: GoodWorker: Design System & Tokens
desc: As Design Manager at GoodWorker (Temasek JV), established design coherence across Worker and Employer apps by building a token-based system from zero. Created shared components, documentation, and processes that reduced design inconsistency and cut time-to-hire by 25%.
summary: Built a scalable token-based design system from scratch for India’s blue-collar recruitment platform.

title: GrowthX Bootcamp Case Studies
desc: Weekly assignments from GrowthX’s product growth program covering acquisition, activation, retention, and revenue levers. Practiced growth thinking across real Indian startups using data-driven frameworks, user segmentation, funnel design, and growth model construction throughout the cohort.
summary: 8-week product growth bootcamp—applying acquisition, retention, and revenue frameworks hands-on.
